程序包 com.iohao.game.widget.light.room.flow

接口 RoomGameFlowService

所有超级接口:
RoomCreateCustom, RoomEnterCustom, RoomGameStartCustom, RoomPlayerCreateCustom
所有已知子接口:
GameRoomService
public interface RoomGameFlowService extends RoomCreateCustom, RoomPlayerCreateCustom, RoomEnterCustom, RoomGameStartCustom
游戏流程 
     房间创建
     创建玩家
     进入房间
     游戏开始
从以下版本开始:
21.8
作者:
渔民小镇

  • 方法概要

    从接口继承的方法 com.iohao.game.widget.light.room.flow.RoomCreateCustom

    createRoom
